steps.title: Focus on the named word
steps.content: The question asks what the text says about gogogs. The passage states that gogs means a dog and gogogs refers to several dogs through reduplication.

steps.title: Use the explicit statement
steps.content: B is not discussed, C contradicts the statement that O'odham has many examples of reduplication, and D invents identical meanings. The passage directly says the element go in gogs gets repeated in gogogs. The answer is A.
